message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for DataFrame.reset_index (2 cases)

Append 2 live-pandas oracle tests covering DataFrame.reset_index:

- reset_index_drop_false: utf8-indexed frame, reset to default
  RangeIndex while preserving the old index as a new "index" column
- reset_index_drop_true: same input, drop=True discards the old
  index entirely

Each test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle (which calls
frame.reset_index(drop=...)), runs the Rust DataFrame.reset_index(
drop), and asserts parity via compare_dataframe_expected.
DataFrameResetIndex was already wired through the Frame response
branch; this fills the live-oracle test gap (companion to the
existing row-multiindex variant in live_oracle_dataframe_row_multiindex.rs).

[bd-frankenpandas-5o0cr]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
